Name: Vicco Turmeric Shaadi Pack (200 gm)
Description:
Vicco Shaadi Pack has been designed keeping in mind the traditional Haldi ceremony and how one can enhance it. Providing all the cherished benefits of Haldi while incorporating the soothing essence of sandalwood oil. It aims to offer a hassle-free alternative to the conventional application of Haldi paste during the ceremony.


Turmeric (Haldi), with its vibrant color, holds deep signiﬁcance in Indian weddings. Any Indian wedding is incomplete without the auspicious tradition of applying haldi. The Haldi ceremony marks the beginning of the wedding celebrations and symbolizes the beginning of a new life together for the bride and groom.  A paste of haldi (Curcuma Longa) is applied on the bride and groom’s face, neck, hands and feet by their loved ones. Turmeric packs in a plethora of beneﬁts for the skin. In addition to its ability to enhance beauty, haldi adds a sense of calmness and piousness to the wedding festivities.


Vicco brings together turmeric extracts and sandalwood oil in a pre-mix cream form, in this most loved product - Vicco Turmeric Skin Cream. This pre-mix has been used for decades as a go-to haldi paste in pre wedding ceremonies. Vicco Turmeric Skin Cream beautiﬁes without leaving a yellow stain on the face. It cleanses, puriﬁes and exfoliates the skin giving it a healthy glow and ensures the bride and the groom look their best during the most important occasion of their lives.


Vicco Turmeric Skin Cream, derived from the rich and opulent science of Ayurveda, is made with the purest of ingredients – healing turmeric and soothing sandalwood oil. An ideal cream for the haldi ceremony due to its beautifying and purifying properties, couples use it before entering into holy matrimony.

Name: Himalaya Gentle Baby Shampoo (400 ml)
Description: Himalaya Gentle Baby Shampoo is a mild, "no tears" shampoo that gently cleanses hair making it soft, shiny, and easy to manage. It softens, nourishes and improves your baby's hair lustre, leaving it soft and fresh. All in all, it is an essential baby care product that helps you get rid of dirt and other harmful infectious particles from your child's scalp, without damaging it. The mild and soft Himalaya herbal shampoo moisturises and nourishes your baby's hair improving its texture. Its core ingredients include chickpea, hibiscus and khus khus. The protein-rich chickpea leaves the hair strong and shiny, while hibiscus acts as a natural conditioner to make it soft and smooth. Khus-khus soothes the baby's scalp, with its antibacterial and antifungal properties. These natural ingredients make Himalaya baby care shampoo perfectly safe for daily use. It cleanses, disinfects and leaves behind a mild scent and lustre with its ideal pH balance. Easy to use, just apply this Himalaya Gentle Baby Shampoo, lather and rinse well to get those shiny baby locks instantly.

This gentle cleanser is ultra-mild and hydrating, which helps skin regain its brightness and healthy and younger-looking complexion. Infused with Papaya extract and aloe vera, this face wash gel helps skin regain its natural brightness and younger-looking complexion. 

The Lotus Herbals Safe Sun De-Tan After Sun Face Pack (Net Qty- 100g ) works exceptionally well to remove the skin’s undesired tan. It clears skin discolouration, unwanted dark spots and repairs the damage from harmful UVA/UVB rays. The Sun Face Pack helps remove pigmentation while neutralizing sun damage, lightens overall complexion, and evens skin tone. The Face Pack can be applied twice a week or more, depending on the sun

Name: Proedit Moisture Melt Hyaluronic Acid Enriched Makeup Removing Balm
Description:
Lotus Make-Up Moisture Melt Hyaluronic Acid Enriched Makeup Removing Balm is the ultimate solution for effortless makeup removal! Say goodbye to stubborn makeup and hello to refreshed, glowing skin with our Hyaluronic Infused Makeup Removing Balm.

Experience the sheer luxury of this balm as it effortlessly glides onto your skin, melting away every trace of makeup, impurities, and daily grime. With just one application, you'll feel the balm gently removing makeup and impurities, leaving your skin looking younger and feeling non-greasy.

Formulated with a blend of powerful ingredients, including Hyaluronic Acid, Shea Butter, Almond Oil, Vitamin E, Lotus Oil, Japanese Sakura, and Rosemary Oil, our Moisture Melt goes beyond just makeup removal.

Hyaluronic Acid deeply hydrates and plumps the skin, improving moisture retention, while Shea Butter nourishes and moisturizes, leaving your skin soft and supple. Almond Oil, rich in vitamin E, soothes and conditions the skin while gently removing makeup.

Our balm also effectively cleanses waterproof makeup, ensuring a thorough and refreshing cleansing experience. Lotus Oil helps balance oil production, soothing and rejuvenating the skin, while Japanese Sakura brightens and revitalizes, promoting a radiant complexion.

To top it off, Rosemary Oil cleanses and purifies the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting circulation, for a truly revitalizing experience.

With Lotus Make-Up Moisture Melt, your skincare routine just got a luxurious upgrade. Discover the joy of effortlessly clean, refreshed, and radiant skin every day.
